title: Charles Bentley Snug Hickory Fireside Set 1 x Large Wood Bucket 1 x Small Kindling Bucket 1 x Matchstick Holder Matte
features: Trio of fireplace essentials Two integral handles on Wood and Kindling Buckets Handle and match lighter included in the matchstick holder Dipped front opening for easy access Laser cut word detailing on each component Black powder coated finish Can hold up to 4kg of logs (Wood Bucket) Can hold up to 2.5kg of kindling (Kindling Bucket) Can hold up to 100g of matchsticks (Matchstick Holder)
1 x Matchstick Holder 1 x Small Kindling Bucket 1 x Large Wood Bucket
Large Wood Bucket: H31 x 36cm Diameter Small Kindling Bucket: H29 x 32cm Diameter Matchstick Holder: H20 x 6.5cm Diameter
Total: 3.35kg Large Wood Bucket: 1.75kg Small Kindling Bucket: 1.45kg Matchstick Holder: 200g
description: Product Description Charles Bentley Snug Hickory Fireside Set This handy trio of stylish fireside accessories are essential for those who take staying warm seriously. With 1 large wood bucket holding 4kg, 1 small kindling bucket holding up to 2.5kg and a matchstick holder holding up to 100g, all your fire building needs can be met. And with carry handles on the log holders, a Log and Kindlings' cutout logo design and black matte finish, your fireside and living room will look stylish as well as feel warm. Colour: Black Features: Trio of fireplace essentials, two integral handles on wood and kindling buckets, handle and match lighter included in the matchstick holder, dipped front opening for easy access Material: Iron Includes: 1 x matchstick holder, 1 x small kindling bucket, 1 x large wood bucket Dimensions: Large wood bucket: H31 x 36cm, diameter small kindling bucket: H29 x 32cm, diameter matchstick holder: H20 x 6.5cm diameter Weight: Total: 3.35kg, large wood bucket: 1.75kg, small kindling bucket: 1.45kg, matchstick holder: 200g Room type: Living room, garage Assembly: This product is best maintained by wiping occasionally with a soft cloth. Do not use any abrasive cleaners.
